payload.answer: I couldn't safely turn this into a durable memory because the Sam note is ambiguous and model confidence is low. Please clarify what should be remembered about Sam.
citations: Cloud escalation disabled and model confidence low for ambiguous Sam note

details: No durable memory committed due to ambiguity.

repair_options: Clarify which Sam is being referenced.
